---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe your idea in plain language. If you have a sketch of the API,
include it.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why is your proposal better?

## Acceptance criteria

How would we know this is done? List specific behaviours or numbers
that would prove it works (see `docs/ACCEPTANCE.md` for the format).

## Additional context

Bench numbers, prior art, screenshots — anything that helps.
